title: High Chunah

'''High Chunah''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] in the [[Javin sector/Legends|Javin sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Once an outlying colony world of the [[Mugaari]] [[Species/Legends|species]], High Chunah became a profitable [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]]-[[Factory world/Legends|manufacturing planet]] once the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] capitalized on the region's economic potential. High Chunah was best known for the phosphorescent rocks littering its surface, which gave the planet an unusual [[Color/Legends|green]] glow when seen from [[Realspace/Legends|space]].

==Description==
The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] High Chunah was located in the [[High Chunah system/Legends|High Chunah system]] of the [[Javin sector/Legends|Javin sector]], within the [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]] region of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']]<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" /> [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]].<ref name="Atlas" /> It was the last Rimward stop on the [[Corellian Trade Spine/Legends|Corellian Trade Spine]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] before entering the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]].<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" />

High Chunah was best known for the phosphorescent rocks that littered its surface.<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|40|High Chunah}}</ref> They shined a pale [[Color/Legends|green]] for up to six [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] after [[Star/Legends|sunset]],<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" /> which gave the planet a strange glow when viewed from [[Realspace|space]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==History==
High Chunah was originally an outlying colony world of the [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Mugaari]] [[Species/Legends|species]], who ruled over a semi-independent domain of eleven [[Star system/Legends|star systems]], known as [[Mugaari Space/Legends|Mugaari Space]], for thousands of [[Standard year/Legends|years]] while remaining suspicious of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. By Republic standards, Mugaari territory was considered then a part of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], an imperfectly surveyed [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] frontier visited only by [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] and the most daring [[Merchant/Legends|traders]].<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" />

A [[Millennium/Legends|millennium]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Republic traders ventured into the frontier from the endpoint of the Corellian Trade Spine at the planet [[Javin]], lured by two other nearby [[Alien/Legends|alien]] civilizations, the [[Lutrillian/Legends|Lutrillians]] and [[Nothoiin (species)/Legends|Nothoiins]]. The traders reached the outer Mugaari worlds of [[Aztubek/Legends|Aztubek]], High Chunah, and beyond, but they could not make contact with these other species without giving up much of their profits to the Mugaari.<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" />

Following a brief, one-sided [[Galactic Republic–Mugaari war|war]] between the Republic and the Mugaari, the Republic established the Javin [[Sector/Legends|sector]] over the former holdings of Mugaari Space and turned the Greater Javin region into an economic powerhouse. High Chunah itself became a profitable [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]]-[[Factory world/Legends|manufacturing planet]].<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" />

==Inhabitants==
One of the worlds colonized by the Mugaari,<ref name="CSWE" /> High Chunah developed into an industrial planet following Republic expansion into the region.<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" />

==Locations==
Much of High Chunah's landmass was covered with factories.<ref name="CSWE" /> The planet became noted for its speeder-manufacturing sector,<ref name="Atlas" /> which produced many of the Greater Javin's [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
High Chunah was created for "[[Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin]]," a [[2004]] [[Wizards.com|online]] supplement for the [[Wizards of the Coast]] ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" />
